---
title: "Arrows in PDF"
format: pdf
filters:
  - arrow
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{tikz}
  - \usetikzlibrary{arrows.meta}
---

## Basic Arrows

Straight line:

{{< arrow from="50,30" to="250,30" >}}

## Curves

Quadratic Bezier (control1):

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" control1="150,0" >}}

Cubic Bezier (control1 + control2):

{{< arrow from="50,30" to="250,100" control1="100,0" control2="200,130" >}}

Simple curve parameter:

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" >}}

Curve with bend right:

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" bend="right" >}}

## Waypoints

Smooth waypoints:

{{< arrow from="30,50" to="270,50" waypoints="100,20; 150,80; 200,20" >}}

Straight waypoints (smooth=false):

{{< arrow from="30,50" to="270,50" waypoints="100,20; 150,80; 200,20" smooth="false" >}}

## Colors

Red: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" color="red" >}}

Blue: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" color="blue" >}}

Green: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" color="green" >}}

## Line Width

Width 1: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" width="1" >}}

Width 2 (default): {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" width="2" >}}

Width 4: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" width="4" >}}

## Dash Patterns

Dashed (true): {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" dash="true" >}}

Custom dash: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" dash="10,5" >}}

## Line Styles

Single (default): {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" line="single" >}}

Dotted: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" line="dot" >}}

Double: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" line="double" >}}

Triple: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" line="triple" >}}

## Arrowhead Styles

Arrow (default): {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" head="arrow" >}}

Stealth: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" head="stealth" >}}

Diamond: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" head="diamond" >}}

Circle: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" head="circle" >}}

Square: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" head="square" >}}

Bar: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" head="bar" >}}

Barbed: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" head="barbed" >}}

None: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" head="none" >}}

## Arrowhead Placement

End only (default): {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" >}}

Start only: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" head-start="true" head-end="false" >}}

Both ends: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" head-start="true" head-end="true" >}}

Neither: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" head-start="false" head-end="false" >}}

## Head Size

Small (5): {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" head-size="5" >}}

Default (10): {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" >}}

Large (20): {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" head-size="20" >}}

## Head Fill

Filled (default): {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" head="diamond" head-fill="true" >}}

Outline: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" head="diamond" head-fill="false" >}}

## Opacity

Full opacity: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" >}}

Half opacity: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" opacity="0.5" >}}

## Combined Styles

Red stealth, thick: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" color="red" head="stealth" width="3" >}}

Blue dashed diamond: {{< arrow from="50,30" to="200,30" color="blue" dash="true" head="diamond" >}}

Curved with style: {{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" color="purple" head="stealth" width="2" >}}
